title: euphrasia nana
intro: Euphrasia nana, also known as dwarf eyebright, is a small, annual or perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae) that grows in damp, shaded areas. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against eye infections and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Euphrasia nana include relief from conjunctivitis, blepharitis, and other eye disorders, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing in other parts of the body. Euphrasia nana is often prepared as a tincture, eye drops, or infusions for its medicinal use, with the tincture being a popular herbal preparation due to its high concentration of active compounds.
